title: OJCP Verification Proof
description: A cryptographic proof of identity verification issued by a verifier. Contains no PII. The proof_token is a JWS (RFC 7515) whose payload MUST include iss, aud, sub, iat, exp, and nonce claims.

step_id.description: The verification step this proof satisfies.

verifier_id.description: Identifier of the verifier that issued this proof. MUST match the 'iss' claim in the proof_token.

verification_type.description: The type of verification that was performed.

proof_token.description: The signed proof artifact — a JWS (RFC 7515) compact serialization. The JWS header MUST include 'alg' and 'kid'. The payload MUST include: 'iss' (verifier_id), 'aud' (provider domain or '*'), 'sub' (subject_hash), 'iat', 'exp', and 'nonce' (application_id). Providers validate the signature against the verifier's JWKS endpoint.

subject_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the verifier's canonical subject identifier. Not reversible to PII. MUST match the 'sub' claim in the proof_token.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proof was issued. MUST represent the same instant in time as the 'iat' NumericDate claim in the proof_token.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proof expires. MUST represent the same instant in time as the 'exp' NumericDate claim in the proof_token.
